scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all:lan: concurrently -n backend,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev:lan --prefix frontend"
scripts.docker:up: node docker/prepare.js && node docker/check-docker-cli_ts.js && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/compose.env up --build
scripts.docker:down: node docker/check-docker-cli_ts.js && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.docker:reset: node docker/check-docker-cli_ts.js && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down -v
scripts.docker:apply-media: node docker/check-docker-cli_ts.js && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T backend npm run apply:media-rules
